scripts.dev: npm run dev -w backend & npm run dev -w frontend
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k -n BACKEND,FRONTEND,ELECTRON -c red,cyan,green "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && cross-env ELECTRON_DEV=1 ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron ."
scripts.electron:build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build:electron:renderer && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json
